subcodes.title: Words to some Bahá'í youth, spoken on 1912-10-22
subcodes.first_line: About teaching. You may teach in two ways. One way is limited teaching; another way is the unlimited teaching.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
